formal_invariants.name: hash_chain_integrity
formal_invariants.description: Every event's prev_hash must equal SHA256(previous_event_payload)

formal_invariants.name: temporal_causality
formal_invariants.description: Event timestamps must be non-decreasing within causal chains

formal_invariants.name: signature_authenticity
formal_invariants.description: Every event must have valid Ed25519 signature from claimed agent

formal_invariants.name: uniqueness_constraint
formal_invariants.description: No two events can have identical (id, payload, agent_id)

formal_invariants.name: immutability
formal_invariants.description: Once committed, events cannot be modified or deleted

formal_invariants.name: distributed_agreement
formal_invariants.description: Event acceptance requires ≥ 2/3 verifier nodes agreement
